subcodes.first_line: O General of the hosts of salvation and the legions of life! If thou seekest to be a commander among the armies of the Kingdom, set thy gaze upon the celestial realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرهنگ لشکر نجات و جنود حیات اگر در بین جنود ملکوت سرهنگی خواهی آهنگ ملک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
